nasb.text: So they said to the king, “The man who consumed us and who planned to exterminate us from remaining within any border of Israel,

esv.text: They said to the king, “The man who consumed us and planned to destroy us, so that we should have no place in all the territory of Israel,

cnv.text: 他們回答王：“從前破壞我們，謀害我們，要消滅我們，使我們不能在以色列境內立足的那人，

ccb.text: 他们说：“扫罗曾试图灭绝我们，把我们从以色列境内铲除。
